seoTitle: Cooma vs Coomba Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cooma and Coomba Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cooma vs Coomba Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cooma and Coomba Bay.
heading: Cooma vs Coomba Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cooma, New South Wales and Coomba Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coomba Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Cooma (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cooma or Coomba Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cooma has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Coomba Bay scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cooma scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Coomba Bay scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cooma or Coomba Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coomba Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
